text:
なんつーか、留まることをしらない
進化っぷりだよな……
マジ、ハンパねえよ！

おたくに追いつくのは並大抵じゃ
無理そうだな……
いや、諦めねーけどさ！

さーてと、オレも今度こそ
鎮圧してくるわ。
攻略法もバッチリだしな！

レランガムもガンナガムも
鎮圧してやるぜ！
攻略法、サンキュ

It's like... You kept going without even
thinking about stopping. You seriously don't do
things half-baked, buddy!

There's no way an ordinary person could ever
catch up to you. Yo, that doesn't mean I'm
givin' up, though!

Which means... This time it's MY turn to take
'em down. I got the perfect strategy now!

Those Rerangam and Gannagam won't know
what hit 'em! Thanks for the guidance, pal!
